title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 287.060 - Employers and employees affected by this act
text:
287.060.  Employers and employees affected by this act. — Every employer and every employee, except as in this chapter otherwise provided, shall be subject to the provisions of this chapter and respectively to furnish and accept compensation as herein provided.
(RSMo 1939 § 3690, A.L. 1953 p. 535, A.L. 1965 p. 397, A.L. 1974 S.B. 417) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 3300
